dependencies: Reliance on insurance companies for commission payments
Dependence on third-party vendors for technology, information security, funds transfers, business process management
Reliance on insurance carrier relationships for underwriting capacity
risks: Loss of or significant change to insurance company or intermediary relationships
Cybersecurity attacks or interruptions in information technology systems of third parties
Failure by third-party service providers to comply with service level agreements or maintain adequate internal controls
Reduced insurer capacity due to reinsurance availability or insurance company failures

regulatory_risks: State-level insurance regulation changes restricting products, markets, methods, prices, or compensation forms
Data privacy and protection law changes (GDPR, California Consumer Privacy Act, New York State Department of Financial Services Cybersecurity Requirements)
Potential federal regulation of insurance industry due to financial services modernization legislation
Changes in tort reform legislation affecting liability insurance demand
Restrictions on contingent commission arrangements by state legislatures or regulators
Licensing law amendments or reinterpretation by regulatory authorities
Non-U.S. laws and regulations compliance risks (international labor, employment, data privacy)
Climate change-related environmental regulations and reporting requirements
ESG (Environmental, Social, Governance) disclosure and compliance requirements
AI and RPA (Robotic Process Automation) governance and ethical regulations
Anti-corruption laws compliance in foreign countries
Changes to National Flood Insurance Program (NFIP) authorization or funding
Regulatory changes affecting F&I (automobile dealer services) products
Potential changes to Affordable Care Act
Federal and state government programs competing with private insurance

sanction_risks: Potential violations of sanctions laws through acquisitions or operations
Risk of non-compliance with anti-corruption laws in foreign jurisdictions
